name: 胡为
bio: 胡为，以野性之力横扫战场的猛虎。他没有防御技能，但终极技能可在受击时施放，以金色蓄力提供保护，是单人游戏的最佳选择。
bio_en: Akos Hu, a fierce tiger who sweeps the battlefield with wild power. He has no defensive skill, but his ultimate can be cast while under attack, providing protection with a gold focus.
story: 胡为，以野性之力横扫战场的猛虎。他的攻击速度极快，移动能力出色，在单人游戏中表现尤为突出。他的咆哮能震慑敌人，以野性本能主导战局。

skills.skill_description: 对附近敌人发动攻击，造成伤害并获得30%伤害减免。每命中一名敌人额外获得10%伤害减免。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Strike nearby enemies to deal damage and gain 30% damage reduction. Each enemy hit grants an additional 10% damage reduction. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 向指定位置释放冲击波。冷却28秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon forth a shockwave toward a selected location. Cooldown: 28s.

skills.skill_description: 胡为咆哮并击退敌人，随后可进行虎跃和扑击。终极技能结束后可发动三次攻击。
skills.skill_description_en: Akos roars and knocks back enemies, then can tiger leap and pounce. After the ultimate, can carry out three strikes.

skills.skill_description: 胡为咆哮并击退敌人，随后可进行虎跃和扑击。终极技能结束后可向前冲刺并击打敌人。
skills.skill_description_en: Akos roars and knocks back enemies, then can tiger leap and pounce. After the ultimate, can lunge forward and smite opponents.
